evals.expected_output: Overview report listing all open handoff sessions in the correct format with A/B/C lettering, task descriptions, workflow stages, relative time, cowork summaries, next step summaries, and handoff IDs. Ends with '要接手哪一個？'
expectations: Output contains overview header mentioning the count of open sessions (e.g., '你有 N 個進行中的 session')
Uses A./B./C. lettering for session blocks
Each session block contains '任務：' line with task description
Each session block contains '階段：' line with workflow stage AND relative time (e.g., '約 3 天前')
Each session block ends with handoff ID in brackets [handoff-YYYYMMDD-HHmmss]
Uses divider lines (at least 20 hyphens) between session blocks
Output ends with '要接手哪一個？' prompt
Each block has a CodeChange line summarizing file changes
Confirmed items use ✅ emoji, in-discussion items use 💬 emoji
Mentions pending count (1 pending item) at the end

evals.prompt: 幫我記一下進度。我們在 evaluate session-handoff 這個 skill，已經設計好 3 個 eval test cases，準備跑 subagent runs。
evals.expected_output: Save workflow: collects git environment info, gathers file changes, builds a proper handoff record, executes save.py, and shows confirmation in the save template format.
expectations: Collects git environment info (project root, branch, last commit) via shell commands
Runs git status/diff commands to gather file changes
Constructs a handoff record with id, status, environment, and task fields
Uses save.py script to persist the record (not writing directly to handoff.json)
Save confirmation output includes '已儲存 session handoff [handoff-...]'
Confirmation includes 任務 description line
Confirmation includes 階段 (workflow stage)
Confirmation includes CodeChange section with file list
Confirmation includes 下一步 with next steps

evals.expected_output: Pending query showing the 1 pending handoff record (Langfuse async generator) in the pending template format.
expectations: Output uses pending format header (e.g., '你有 1 個暫時擱置的 session')
Shows the Langfuse async generator TypeError handoff
Includes the handoff ID [handoff-20260320-104648]
Uses the pending template format with project, task, stage, cowork summary
Output is in Traditional Chinese (Taiwan) style
